The entrance to the Orc-caves may be found along the western rock wall in the Wailing Hills, behind the Orc-camp that held Frithstan. The Rohirrim-cap…
Frithstan can be found at his camp to along the road north of the Cuthstan. He awaits your return from the Orc-caves.
